title: Amazon Basics Soft Grip Retractable Box Cutter with 3 Replaceable Blades, Black/Silver
features: Replaceable blades: includes 3 carbon-steel blades (1 loaded and 2 spare that store inside the body)
Universal blade system: accommodates any compatible utility blade; easy push-button opening allows for quick blade changes (no screwdriver needed)
Retractable: easily slide the blade out when working and retract it back inside the housing for safety when not in use
Soft-grip ergonomic handle: helps ensure a secure, comfortable hold
Durable construction: made of 72% aluminium, 10% TPR, 10% carbon steel and 8% POM
description: From the manufacturer AmazonBasics Soft-Grip Retractable Box Cutter with 3 Blades Be prepared for a variety of cutting tasks with help from this AmazonBasics soft-grip retractable box cutter. The lightweight, easy-to-carry knife comes in handy for anything from trimming materials to opening packages or cutting tape, cord or cardboard. The box cutter makes a great choice for at home or at work. Details Retractable, replaceable blade (3 included) Works with any compatible utility blade Easy push-button opening for quick blade changes Soft-grip, ergonomic handle Retractable, Replaceable Blades Three carbon-steel blades are included. One blade comes loaded and ready to work, and the two spare blades are stored safely away inside the body of the knife. When not working, retract the blade to protect against unwanted cuts and to keep the blade safe from damage. Extend the blade in one smooth move when ready to start working again. An easy push-button opening allows for convenient blade changes (no screwdriver needed). Ergonomic Handle The AmazonBasics box cutter provides a soft-grip, ergonomic handle to help ensure a steady, secure grip and a comfortable hold, even during long cutting sessions.
